THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. PLAINTIFF B.D. THAKOR TO HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST HEIDI GREGORIO FOR THE SUM OF $1,175.00 AND RESTITUTION OF 118 TAYLOR STREET #419 SAN FRANCISCO, CA.94103. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH; ACTUAL EVICTION SHALL NOT OCCUR UNTIL AFTER 11/27/02 12:00 NOON. EVICTION SHALL BE POSPONED AND DEFENDANT MAY CONTINUE TO RESIDE AT THE PREMISE SO LONG AS THERE IS FULL AND TIMELY COMPLIANCE WITH THE PAYMENT PLAN SPECIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY IN THIS DOCUMENT AS SCANNED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. LORETTA M. NORRIS, COMMISSIONER. APPROVED AS TO FORM AND OCONTENT BY DEFENDANT HEIDI GREGORIO.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Eric L. Throne. David G. Mendez, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff, B>D> Thakor and Defendants, Heidi Gregorio and Jesse Armstead appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of the parties and read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
